step_rationale: Glucose-derived metabolite elevated in I/R; glycosylation and immune activation.
mechanism: UDP-glucose elevation reflects altered glucose metabolism and immune-cell glycosylation during ischemia-reperfusion.

references.title: Cardiac ischaemia/reperfusion in pigs and mice increases cardiomyocyte Krüppel-like factor 5 that aggravates tissue injury and remodelling.
Empagliflozin restores cardiac metabolism and suppresses immune activation in acute myocardial infarction.
